internalNotes: Audited against official SBI Card product page and BPCL SBI Card OCTANE T&C booklet on 2026-06-08.

The live product page positions the card as offering 7.25% value back on BPCL purchases, which is effectively the 25 Reward Points per Rs 100 earn plus surcharge waiver framing; the rewards table keeps the points structure as the canonical model.
The current official card materials show Visa and RuPay acceptance references for the card booklet, so both networks are retained.
